title: WineObject
description: Extraction-phase schema for a single wine entry as emitted by Qwen3-VL via the backend's /scan endpoint Phase 1. Defines only the 10 VLM-extracted fields — NOT the full in-memory client model (which additionally carries wine_id, tastingNote, and pairings injected by Phase 2 SSE events). Canonical field definition for extraction fields — keep in sync with WineObject.swift (macOS + iOS), backend/backend/models/wine.py, and web/src/types/wine.ts. See CONTRIBUTING.md.

name.description: Wine name as printed on the list

producer.description: Winery or producer name; often the same as name

variety.description: Grape variety or blend, e.g. "Cabernet Sauvignon"

appellation.description: Region or appellation, e.g. "Napa Valley, California"

price.description: Price as printed including currency symbol, e.g. "$48"

description.description: Tasting notes or description text from the list

listSection.description: Section header under which this wine appears, e.g. "Red Wines"

rawText.description: Complete original text for this wine entry as it appears on the list

confidence.description: Model self-reported certainty that name and vintage are correctly extracted. 0.9+ = clear text, 0.6-0.8 = partially legible, <0.6 = guesses.
